steps.title: Make a two-row table
steps.content: The problem gives one point and one rate. Since $y=18$ when $x=2$, use the point $(2,18)$. Because every increase of $1$ in $x$ increases $y$ by $8$, the slope is $8$.

steps.title: Find the line from the data
steps.content: Use $y=mx+b$ with $m=8$ and the point $(2,18)$: $$18=8(2)+b$$ $$18=16+b$$ $$b=2$$ So the equation is $y=8x+2$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The matching choice is the only equation with slope $8$ and intercept $2$. A quick check gives $8(2)+2=18$, so C is correct.
